equipmentMods.belt: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
equipmentMods.bracer: Every 4 seconds your character pulses with Fire Damage. Each enemy hit grants a 3% Fire Damage blessing, stacking up to 100
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orb: When Arcane orbs return to the player, it creates an Arcane burst, dealing 25% damage and a bonus +5% for every additional orb.
equipmentMods.helmet: Gain 3 base Elemental Damage for every Energy point above 100.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 10% increased damage. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
